title: Fixed income weekly: Middle East conflict a negative for asset prices
description: Domestic bond yields continued to see upside pressure due to elevated oil prices and foreign outflows amidst the Middle East conflict. title: WPI: Wholesale inflation surges to 11-month high

title: Food inflation inches higher, while core steady
description: CPI inflation came in at 3.21% YoY in Feb (our est: 3.12%) compared with 2.74% in Jan, driven by higher food inflation at 3.5% YoY (2.1% in Jan), while core inflation was steady at 3.4% YoY (same as Jan). Download the report to know more.

title: US CPI: Inflation was stable ahead of another energy shock
description: US CPI inflation printed in line with expectations both on sequential by 0.3% MoM and on a YoY basis by 2.4% YoY in February. Core inflation also came in line with expectations printing in at 2.5% YoY and 0.2% MoM showing that the underlying inflation is at the slowest annual pace since early 2021.

title: China Trade: export momentum remained robust
description: China’s exports rose sharply by 21.8% while imports rose by 19.8% in the January-February 2026 period. China's trade surplus for the first two months of 2026 came in at USD 213.6bn, far exceeding the USD 169.21 bn recorded in the same period last year. Download the report to know more.
